---
title: "Imidacloprid Beta diversity (Bray Curtis)"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
install.packages("ape")
library(vegan)
library(ape)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```
```{r}
bray_dist <- vegdist(count_matrix, method = "bray")
pcoa_res <- pcoa(bray_dist)
pcoa_df <- as.data.frame(pcoa_res$vectors)

```
```{r}
# Get sample names
sample_ids <- rownames(count_matrix)

# Create metadata dataframe
meta <- data.frame(SampleID = sample_ids)

# Extract Time
meta$Time <- ifelse(grepl("M$", sample_ids), "Mid",
             ifelse(grepl("F$", sample_ids), "Final", "Initial"))

# Extract FrogID (remove M or F at end)
meta$FrogID <- gsub("M$|F$", "", sample_ids)

# Extract Treatment based on first letter
meta$Treatment <- ifelse(grepl("^C", meta$FrogID), "Control",
                  ifelse(grepl("^L", meta$FrogID), "Low", "High"))

# Convert to factors
meta$Treatment <- factor(meta$Treatment)
meta$Time <- factor(meta$Time, levels = c("Initial","Mid","Final"))

head(meta)
```


```{r}
pcoa_df$SampleID <- rownames(pcoa_df)

pcoa_df <- merge(pcoa_df, meta, by = "SampleID")
nrow(meta)
```
```{r}
table(meta$FrogID)
```
```{r}
meta[meta$FrogID == "L3", ]
length(unique(meta$SampleID))
rownames(count_matrix)
```
```{r}
count_matrix <- count_matrix[rownames(count_matrix) != "Combined", ]
nrow(count_matrix)
```
```{r}
sample_ids <- rownames(count_matrix)

meta <- data.frame(SampleID = sample_ids)

meta$Time <- ifelse(grepl("M$", sample_ids), "Mid",
             ifelse(grepl("F$", sample_ids), "Final", "Initial"))

meta$FrogID <- gsub("M$|F$", "", sample_ids)

meta$Treatment <- ifelse(grepl("^C", meta$FrogID), "Control",
                  ifelse(grepl("^L", meta$FrogID), "Low", "High"))

meta$Treatment <- factor(meta$Treatment)
meta$Time <- factor(meta$Time, levels = c("Initial","Mid","Final"))

nrow(meta)
```
```{r}
bray_dist <- vegdist(count_matrix, method = "bray")
pcoa_res <- cmdscale(bray_dist, k = 2, eig = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# Extract coordinates
pcoa_df <- as.data.frame(pcoa_res$points)
colnames(pcoa_df) <- c("Axis1", "Axis2")

# Add sample IDs
pcoa_df$SampleID <- rownames(pcoa_df)

# Merge metadata
pcoa_df <- merge(pcoa_df, meta, by = "SampleID")
```

```{r}
percent_var <- round(100 * pcoa_res$eig / sum(pcoa_res$eig), 1)
```

```{r}
ggplot(pcoa_df, aes(x = Axis1, y = Axis2, 
                    color = Treatment, 
                    shape = Time)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = paste0("PCoA 1 (", percent_var[1], "%)"),
    y = paste0("PCoA 2 (", percent_var[2], "%)")
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(pcoa_df, aes(x = Axis1, y = Axis2, 
                    color = Treatment)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ Time) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = paste0("PCoA 1 (", percent_var[1], "%)"),
    y = paste0("PCoA 2 (", percent_var[2], "%)")
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 14)
  )
```

```{r}
all(rownames(count_matrix) == meta$SampleID)
```

```{r}
adonis2(bray_dist ~ Time, data = meta, permutations = 999)
```
```{r}
adonis2(bray_dist ~ Treatment, data = meta, permutations = 999)
```
```{r}
anova(betadisper(bray_dist, meta$Time))
anova(betadisper(bray_dist, meta$Treatment))
```
```{r}
set.seed(123)

adonis2(
  bray_dist ~ meta$Time,
  permutations = 999
)
```

```{r}
adonis2(
  bray_dist ~ meta$Treatment,
  permutations = 999
)
```
```{r}
anova(betadisper(bray_dist, meta$Time))
anova(betadisper(bray_dist, meta$Treatment))
```

```{r}
adonis_treatment <- adonis2(bray_dist ~ Treatment, 
                            data = meta, 
                            permutations = 999)

adonis_time <- adonis2(bray_dist ~ Time, 
                       data = meta, 
                       permutations = 999)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

# Treatment
treat_table <- as.data.frame(adonis_treatment) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Effect") %>%
  filter(Effect == "Model") %>%
  mutate(
    Effect = "Treatment",
    R2 = round(R2, 3),
    F = round(F, 3),
    `p-value` = `Pr(>F)`
  ) %>%
  select(Effect, Df, R2, F, `p-value`)

# Time
time_table <- as.data.frame(adonis_time) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Effect") %>%
  filter(Effect == "Model") %>%
  mutate(
    Effect = "Time",
    R2 = round(R2, 3),
    F = round(F, 3),
    `p-value` = `Pr(>F)`
  ) %>%
  select(Effect, Df, R2, F, `p-value`)

# Combine
permanova_table <- bind_rows(treat_table, time_table)

permanova_table
```
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(flextable)
library(officer)

# Extract Treatment
treat_table <- as.data.frame(adonis_treatment) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Effect") %>%
  filter(Effect == "Model") %>%
  mutate(
    Effect = "Treatment",
    R2 = round(R2, 3),
    F = round(F, 2),
    `p-value` = round(`Pr(>F)`, 3)
  ) %>%
  select(Effect, Df, R2, F, `p-value`)

# Extract Time
time_table <- as.data.frame(adonis_time) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Effect") %>%
  filter(Effect == "Model") %>%
  mutate(
    Effect = "Time",
    R2 = round(R2, 3),
    F = round(F, 2),
    `p-value` = round(`Pr(>F)`, 3)
  ) %>%
  select(Effect, Df, R2, F, `p-value`)

# Combine
permanova_table <- bind_rows(treat_table, time_table)

# Add significance stars
permanova_table <- permanova_table %>%
  mutate(
    Significance = case_when(
      `p-value` < 0.001 ~ "***",
      `p-value` < 0.01  ~ "**",
      `p-value` < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  )

# Create flextable
ft <- flextable(permanova_table) %>%
  set_caption("Table X. PERMANOVA results testing effects of Treatment and Time on Bray–Curtis beta diversity.") %>%
  theme_booktabs() %>%
  autofit()

# Bold significant p-values
ft <- bold(ft, i = ~ `p-value` < 0.05, j = "p-value", bold = TRUE)

# Export to Word
doc <- read_docx() %>%
  body_add_flextable(ft)

print(doc, target = "PERMANOVA_Table.docx")
```
